docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON SEP-15-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENIVRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO KOHL'S DEPARTMENT STORES, INC. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(F)(4). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Kohl'S Department Stores, Inc.

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENIVRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and for Entry of Consent Judgment as to Kohl's Department Stores, Inc. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted, no opposition filed, and settlement complies with Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f)(4). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
